differential_diagnoses: Neurotoxicity (e.g., secondary to medications or metabolic derangement)
next_steps: Strict blood pressure control (target systolic < 140 mm Hg)
Urgent neurology and neurocritical care consultation
Obtain toxicology screen for other potential neurotoxic agents
Evaluate for underlying triggers (e.g., renal function, electrolyte imbalances, infection)
